chapter_title.ar: باب الْقَوْلِ عِنْدَ دُخُولِ الْخَلَاءِ وَ عِنْدَ الْخُرُوجِ وَ الِاسْتِنْجَاءِ وَ مَنْ نَسِيَهُ وَ التَّسْمِيَةِ عِنْدَ الدُّخُولِ وَ عِنْدَ الْوُضُوءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – The words (to be spoken) during entering the toilet, and during the exit, and the cleansing (afterwards), and the one who forgets, and Naming (Bismillah) during the entering and during the Ablution (Wudhu)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/59)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/59)
text: تَوَضَّأْتُ يَوْماً وَ لَمْ أَغْسِلْ ذَكَرِي ثُمَّ صَلَّيْتُ فَسَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ اغْسِلْ ذَكَرَكَ وَ أَعِدْ صَلَاتَكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibn Azina, from Zurara who said,
‘I performed Ablution (Wudhu) one day and did not wash my manhood. Then I Prayed. So I asked Abu Abdullahasws, and heasws said: ‘Wash your manhood and repeat the Salaat’.
en.sarwar: 14. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ibn ’Udhaynah from Zurarah who has said the following: “One day I took Wudu’ but forgot to wash my urethra clean; then I performed Salah (prayer). I asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about it.
